login.title: Login
login.subtitle: Welcome to Wellbeing Platform
login.error_locked: Too many failed attempts. Please wait 15 minutes.
login.hero_desc: Redefine employee happiness with data-driven analytics, AI-powered insights, and personalized wellbeing journeys.
login.subtitle_admin: Enter your credentials to access your management panel.
login.no_account: Is your organization not using WellAnalytics yet?

forgot_password.title: Reset Password
forgot_password.subtitle: Enter your email address, we'll send a reset link
forgot_password.success: Email sent. Please check your inbox.

reset_password.title: Set New Password
reset_password.success: Your password has been updated. You can now log in.
reset_password.error_expired: This link is invalid or has expired.
reset_password.requirements: At least 8 characters, must include uppercase/lowercase and numbers

invite.title: Create Your Account
invite.subtitle: Welcome to Wellbeing Platform
invite.welcome: Hello! You have been invited on behalf of {{company_name}}.
invite.success: Your account has been created. Redirecting...
invite.error_expired: This invitation link is invalid or has expired.
invite.error_used: This invitation link has already been used.

demo.title: Request a Demo
demo.subtitle: Request a demo to explore the platform.
demo.success_message: We will contact you as soon as possible.
